title: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Biological Sciences
content: Galgotias University doctoral program in Biological sciences require students to develop research based aptitude leading to study of living organisms, including biology, ecology, evolution and neuroscience This advanced degree incorporates various fields of biological sciences such as Stem Cell Biology, Evolutionary & Population Genetics, Genome Organization, Maintenance & Expression, Microbiology, Neuroscience, Structural Biology, Biophysics, Biochemistry & Chemical Biology, or Systems Biology. The program emphasis is also laid on to encourage students to participate in several seminars, project works, and research in scientific laboratories, analyze the results, and publish the findings in academic journals.
